Decision Tree

MIKE

2026-04-07

Import Data

train <- readRDS("train_original.rds")
test <- readRDS("test_original.rds")

str(train)
## 'data.frame':    20688 obs. of  15 variables:
##  $ Age                         : int  34 54 61 62 47 30 72 58 47 66 ...
##  $ Marital.Status              : Factor w/ 4 levels "Divorced","Married",..: 1 2 2 2 2 2 2 2 1 2 ...
##  $ Education.Level             : Factor w/ 5 levels "Associate Degree",..: 1 4 4 2 2 2 3 1 3 1 ...
##  $ Number.of.Children          : int  1 1 1 1 0 0 2 3 2 1 ...
##  $ Smoking.Status              : Factor w/ 3 levels "Current","Former",..: 3 3 3 3 2 2 3 3 3 3 ...
##  $ Physical.Activity.Level     : Factor w/ 3 levels "Active","Moderate",..: 2 2 2 2 3 1 3 3 3 3 ...
##  $ Employment.Status           : Factor w/ 2 levels "Employed","Unemployed": 1 1 2 1 1 2 2 1 2 2 ...
##  $ Income                      : num  63839 107211 22052 55359 91215 ...
##  $ Alcohol.Consumption         : Factor w/ 3 levels "High","Low","Moderate": 3 2 1 3 3 2 1 3 3 3 ...
##  $ Dietary.Habits              : Factor w/ 3 levels "Healthy","Moderate",..: 2 2 1 2 2 1 2 3 3 3 ...
##  $ Sleep.Patterns              : Factor w/ 3 levels "Fair","Good",..: 2 1 3 1 2 2 3 1 3 3 ...
##  $ History.of.Mental.Illness   : Factor w/ 2 levels "No","Yes": 2 2 2 1 2 2 1 1 1 1 ...
##  $ History.of.Substance.Abuse  : Factor w/ 2 levels "No","Yes": 2 1 1 2 2 1 1 1 1 1 ...
##  $ Family.History.of.Depression: Factor w/ 2 levels "No","Yes": 1 2 1 2 1 2 1 1 2 1 ...
##  $ Chronic.Medical.Conditions  : Factor w/ 2 levels "No","Yes": 1 1 1 1 1 1 1 1 2 1 ...
summary(train)
##       Age         Marital.Status           Education.Level Number.of.Children
##  Min.   :18.00   Divorced: 1596   Associate Degree :4071   Min.   :0.000     
##  1st Qu.:33.00   Married :12032   Bachelor's Degree:6142   1st Qu.:0.000     
##  Median :49.00   Single  : 3640   High School      :5957   Median :1.000     
##  Mean   :49.08   Widowed : 3420   Master's Degree  :3650   Mean   :1.292     
##  3rd Qu.:65.00                    PhD              : 868   3rd Qu.:2.000     
##  Max.   :80.00                                             Max.   :4.000     
##     Smoking.Status  Physical.Activity.Level  Employment.Status
##  Current   : 2465   Active   :3987          Employed  :13233  
##  Former    : 5809   Moderate :7807          Unemployed: 7455  
##  Non-smoker:12414   Sedentary:8894                            
##                                                               
##                                                               
##                                                               
##      Income          Alcohol.Consumption   Dietary.Habits Sleep.Patterns
##  Min.   :     5.11   High    :4976       Healthy  :3557   Fair:9884     
##  1st Qu.: 20698.78   Low     :7013       Moderate :8538   Good:4388     
##  Median : 37599.46   Moderate:8699       Unhealthy:8593   Poor:6416     
##  Mean   : 50611.94                                                      
##  3rd Qu.: 76522.85                                                      
##  Max.   :209968.73                                                      
##  History.of.Mental.Illness History.of.Substance.Abuse
##  No :14339                 No :14225                 
##  Yes: 6349                 Yes: 6463                 
##                                                      
##                                                      
##                                                      
##                                                      
##  Family.History.of.Depression Chronic.Medical.Conditions
##  No :15196                    No :13824                 
##  Yes: 5492                    Yes: 6864                 
##                                                         
##                                                         
##                                                         
##

Decision Tree Model (rpart)

library(rpart)
library(rpart.plot)

loss_matrix <- matrix(c(0, 1, 5, 0), nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE)

dt_model <- rpart(
  History.of.Mental.Illness ~ ., 
  data = train, 
  method = "class",
  parms = list(loss = loss_matrix),
  control = rpart.control(cp = 0.001, minsplit = 20)
)

summary(dt_model)
## Call:
## rpart(formula = History.of.Mental.Illness ~ ., data = train,

Visualize the Tree

rpart.plot(dt_model, type = 4, extra = 104, fallen.leaves = TRUE)
## Warning: labs do not fit even at cex 0.15, there may be some overplotting

Plot

plotcp(dt_model)

printcp(dt_model)
## 
## Classification tree:
## rpart(formula = History.of.Mental.Illness ~ ., data = train, 
##     method = "class", parms = list(loss = loss_matrix), control = rpart.control(cp = 0.001, 
##         minsplit = 20))
## 
## Variables actually used in tree construction:
##  [1] Age                        Alcohol.Consumption       
##  [3] Chronic.Medical.Conditions Dietary.Habits            
##  [5] Education.Level            History.of.Substance.Abuse
##  [7] Income                     Marital.Status            
##  [9] Physical.Activity.Level    Sleep.Patterns            
## [11] Smoking.Status            
## 
## Root node error: 14339/20688 = 0.69311
## 
## n= 20688 
## 
##          CP nsplit rel error xerror     xstd
## 1 0.0010013      0   1.00000 5.0000 0.023132
## 2 0.0010000     28   0.96806 4.9309 0.023304

Pruning

# prune using the cp with the lowest xerror
best_cp <- dt_model$cptable[which.min(dt_model$cptable[, "xerror"]), "CP"]
dt_model_pruned <- prune(dt_model, cp = best_cp)

rpart.plot(dt_model_pruned, type = 4, extra = 104, fallen.leaves = TRUE)
## Warning: labs do not fit even at cex 0.15, there may be some overplotting

Predictions on Test Set

dt_pred <- predict(dt_model_pruned, test, type = "class")
dt_prob <- predict(dt_model_pruned, test, type = "prob")

head(dt_pred)
## 389434 110274  20336 237078 185272 195976 
##    Yes    Yes    Yes    Yes    Yes    Yes 
## Levels: No Yes
head(dt_prob)
##               No       Yes
## 389434 0.6963048 0.3036952
## 110274 0.7724230 0.2275770
## 20336  0.6423346 0.3576654
## 237078 0.6423346 0.3576654
## 185272 0.6423346 0.3576654
## 195976 0.6423346 0.3576654

Evaluate

library(caret)
## Loading required package: ggplot2
## Loading required package: lattice
confusionMatrix(as.factor(dt_pred), as.factor(test$History.of.Mental.Illness), positive = "Yes")
## Confusion Matrix and Statistics
## 
##           Reference
## Prediction    No   Yes
##        No   1230   297
##        Yes 13136  6025
##                                           
##                Accuracy : 0.3507          
##                  95% CI : (0.3442, 0.3572)
##     No Information Rate : 0.6944          
##     P-Value [Acc > NIR] : 1               
##                                           
##                   Kappa : 0.0246          
##                                           
##  Mcnemar's Test P-Value : <2e-16          
##                                           
##             Sensitivity : 0.95302         
##             Specificity : 0.08562         
##          Pos Pred Value : 0.31444         
##          Neg Pred Value : 0.80550         
##              Prevalence : 0.30559         
##          Detection Rate : 0.29123         
##    Detection Prevalence : 0.92619         
##       Balanced Accuracy : 0.51932         
##                                           
##        'Positive' Class : Yes             
##

Save Outputs

saveRDS(dt_model_pruned, file = "dt_model.rds")
saveRDS(dt_pred, file = "dt_pred.rds")
saveRDS(dt_prob, file = "dt_prob.rds")
